name: almondoo-claude-plugins
description: Claude Code plugin marketplace published by almondoo.

plugins.name: claude-md-parallel-audit
plugins.description: Multi-agent parallel audit of CLAUDE.md and similar agent-instruction files. Dispatches N independent subagents, aggregates findings by reproducibility (≥4/9 default), and proposes targeted fixes.

plugins.name: configure-github-permissions
plugins.description: Interactively configure GitHub CLI (gh) permissions in .claude/settings.local.json via 10 categories × 3 choices (allow / ask / deny). Destructive categories (merge, release, workflow exec, gh api) default to deny.

plugins.name: skill-eval
plugins.description: Evaluate any Claude Code skill on two layers: (1) static structural quality scoring derived from claude-code plugin conventions (frontmatter validity, body length, progressive disclosure, description triggerability) and (2) dynamic A/B benchmarking that runs the same prompts in parallel subagents with-skill vs without-skill and compares pass rate, time, and tokens.

plugins.name: skill-md-parallel-audit
plugins.description: Multi-agent parallel audit of SKILL.md files for HIGH-severity prose defects (missing qualifiers, cross-section contradictions, undefined terms). Sibling of claude-md-parallel-audit: same N-instance + reproducibility-threshold engine, retuned for SKILL.md (skill-specific exclusion defaults, redundancy classification against other skills).
